implement.detail: lib/fixer.mjs: REHEARSAL_BUDGET (25 calls/5 per index/4min/5 pauses), detectHumanActionable regex fast-path (CAPTCHA/MFA/payment/identity), applyPatch (insert_before/replace_current/skip_current/pause_for_user/abort), validatePatch (FIXER_ALLOWED_STEP_TYPES allowlist), proposePatch (Router-routed via vision route mode:fix). Engine fixer loop: recoverable-only gating (orchestrator marks page failures recoverable; observe/infra fails fast), human-actionable -> paused_for_user, budget gates, propose->validate->applyPatch->retry-at-index, run_patch SSE (proposing/applied/aborted).

test.detail: automations-fixer (12: fast-path, applyPatch each kind, validate incl. allowlist-reject, proposePatch) + engine fixer-loop (self-heal retry, CAPTCHA pause, budget no-infinite-loop, infra fail-fast). typecheck clean.

codexReview.detail: R1 (critical x2, same issue): fixer could inject arbitrary step types (local_command/connector/api_call/sub_automation) -> shell/network authority. FIXED: validatePatch FIXER_ALLOWED_STEP_TYPES allowlist. R2 (high): injected deps.proposePatch bypassed validatePatch -> FIXED: engine re-validates at the boundary. No rebuttals.

codexPwTest.detail: Z1 injects a failure + observes self-heal
